description.tr: Routing map for UK nations, Scotland/Wales/NI and European feeder legs into the Turkey lane—request pricing on the quote page.

keyword.tr: UK nations routing map, European feeder Turkey corridor, Scotland Wales NI collection planning

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Country pages explain routing; use contact or quote for pricing.
